bio: Masoud Pezeshkian, a cardiac surgeon and long-serving MP for Tabriz, won the snap presidential election of July 2024 following Raisi's death. He ran on a moderate platform and was endorsed by reformist figures including [Khatami](/people/mohammad-khatami) and [Zarif](/people/javad-zarif). Ethnically Azerbaijani, he is the first non-Persian-speaking president. He previously served as Minister of Health under Khatami (2001–2005).
editorial_notes: Took office 28 July 2024. First Azerbaijani-Iranian president.
